title: Define Blueprint with Team
expectation: Use a manager-hosted feature-branch worktree as the only mutable surface for this process; never edit blueprint files from the shared repository checkout. Create that worktree from the current upstream base branch tip under the canonical worktree location. Do not reuse an existing feature branch or worktree unless you created it earlier in the current process and have already verified that it is the intended mutable surface. After creating that worktree, merge only any additional upstream branch that is intentionally required beyond the chosen base branch before continuing. Review relevant existing blueprints, including the canonical Agentish sections blueprint, the Agentish quality blueprint, and the relevant agent-team blueprints, when defining or restructuring a subject blueprint. Define the section-level table of contents first, then prepare explicit section-drafting packets so each team sub agent receives the shared concept, assigned section, canonical Agentish sections blueprint, Agentish quality blueprint, and the relevant team profile blueprints before drafting. Combine the section drafts into one whole-file draft blueprint, collect section-keyed whole-file review feedback from the team, prepare explicit section-rewrite packets from the combined draft plus the grouped feedback for each section, combine the rewritten sections into one proposal blueprint, collect final whole-file team review, and repeat the rewrite loop until the team accepts the blueprint. Commit the blueprint changes, merge the branch into development, and push development to origin.
idlePrompt: If the team-authored blueprint work is complete and the final blueprint has been accepted by the team, reply only with 'done: blueprint defined'. If you are truly blocked on missing user information, target subject definition, or required repository context, reply only with 'blocked: blueprint clarification required'. Otherwise resume the team blueprint-authoring loop immediately and perform the next outline, drafting, review, rewrite, or integration step instead of giving only a status update.

steps.title: Define and integrate the blueprint with the team
Review relevant existing blueprints, Agentish sections, and agent-team blueprints
Create the section-level table of contents for the blueprint file
Prepare one section-drafting packet per section with the shared concept, assigned section, Agentish sections blueprint, Agentish quality blueprint, and team profile inputs
Dispatch each section-drafting packet to the assigned team sub agent
Combine the section drafts into one whole-file draft blueprint
Ask each team member sub agent to review the whole draft blueprint and return section-keyed feedback for every section
Prepare one section-rewrite packet per section from the combined draft plus all grouped feedback for that section
Dispatch each section-rewrite packet to the assigned team sub agent
Combine the rewritten sections into one proposal blueprint
Ask each team member to review the whole proposal blueprint and either accept it or request final section changes
Did the team accept the proposal blueprint?

decision.prompt: Did the team accept the proposal blueprint?

options.title: The team accepts the final blueprint

steps.title: Run `bun run agent:merge-manager-feature -- <feature-branch-name>` to merge the local feature branch from its manager worktree and push `development` to origin
